GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/JMQ)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate And Set Aside Notice Of Settlement
Off Calendar Feb-03-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK's Motion To Vacate And Set Aside Notice Of Settlement.

Plaintiff AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK's unopposed Motion To Vacate And Set Aside Notice Of Settlement is GRANTED. The next court date is confirmed as August 19, 2025, at 10:30 am in Department 610 on an order to show cause.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and deliver it to Dept. 302's inbox.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
